Module_1_Identity.3. Geography & Cultural Context: Lives in Seattle, WA (Capitol Hill neighborhood); originally from Pune, India; immigrated to US in 2014 for graduate school; H1B-to-Green Card holder navigating dual cultural identity
Module_1_Identity.4. Socioeconomic Status & Vocation: Senior Staff Software Engineer at a mid-tier cloud infrastructure firm (NimbusForge Inc.); base salary $215K + RSUs underwater since 2024 stock dip; carrying $480K mortgage and $62K remaining student loans; household income dual-earner but stretched by recent IVF treatments
Module_1_Identity.5. Core Values (Political/Religious lean: Center-left progressive; culturally Hindu but non-practicing; strong values around meritocracy, technical craftsmanship, and work-life sustainability; skeptical of corporate loyalty narratives after 2023 layoff wave
Module_1_Identity.6. Baseline Tone (Formal, slang-heavy, c: Dry, understated, increasingly cynical; precise technical vocabulary mixed with self-deprecating humor; tone has shifted noticeably more bitter in last 8 months on internal Slack and LinkedIn comments
Module_1_Identity.7. Primary Language & Dialect: English (Indian-American hybrid, near-native PNW professional register); fluent Marathi and Hindi used only with family; code-switches to more formal English in written professional contexts
Module_1_Identity.8. Current Life Phase: Mid-career plateau anxiety phase: passed over for Principal Engineer promotion in Q1 2026 review cycle, manager reorg pending, recently unfollowed CEO on LinkedIn, updated personal GitHub README two weeks ago — classic pre-attrition signal window

Module_2_DeviceOPSEC.9. Primary Phone (OS + Age of device): iPhone 14 Pro (purchased Sept 2022, ~3.5 years old); iOS 18.4; battery health at 82%, has been deferring upgrade since RSU dip; work profile via Intune MDM container kept strictly separate from personal apps
Module_2_DeviceOPSEC.10. Computer (OS + Browser choice): Personal: M2 MacBook Air (2023) running macOS Sonoma, primary browser Arc with Firefox as secondary for banking; Work: company-issued M3 MacBook Pro locked down with Jamf, Chrome (mandated) + iTerm2 + VSCode Insiders; clear separation between personal and work browsers
Module_2_DeviceOPSEC.11. OPSEC Knowledge (VPN usage, cookie c: Above-average technical literacy but inconsistent practice: Mullvad VPN subscription (paid in cash-equivalent vouchers) used only on hotel Wi-Fi and when torrenting; uBlock Origin + Privacy Badger always on; clears cookies maybe quarterly; uses 1Password (family plan) with unique passwords on ~140 sites; has separate burner Gmail for recruiter outreach (anjali.s.eng@gmail.com) — a key tell for poaching-readiness
Module_2_DeviceOPSEC.12. Cloud Sync Habits: iCloud+ 200GB tier (photos, Notes, Keychain syncing across devices); Google Drive personal for tax docs and IVF medical records; Dropbox legacy account dormant; work files strictly in company OneDrive/SharePoint; recently began syncing personal GitHub stars and saved articles — building an external portfolio shadow of work
Module_2_DeviceOPSEC.13. Notification Fatigue (Read/Unread ra: Personal Gmail: 14,200 unread of 38,000 (high fatigue, but LinkedIn InMail notifications get opened within 2 hours — 92% open rate, up from 31% a year ago); Slack work DMs: read within 4 min during work hours, but @channel mentions ignored; phone is on permanent Focus mode 'Work' 9-6, but 'Recruiter' VIP list configured two weeks ago routes specific senders through Do Not Disturb
Module_2_DeviceOPSEC.14. Typos & Grammar Mechanics: Clean, near-zero typos in async written work (Google Docs, design RFCs); on Slack uses lowercase-only style with occasional Oxford comma; consistent em-dash usage (a generational tell); Indian-English spellings show up rarely ('grey', 'cancelled') in personal contexts only; voice-to-text artifacts visible in evening iMessages ('definitely' rendered as 'defiantly' twice in last month) suggesting fatigue and reduced proofreading bandwidth

Module_4_Vulnerability.15. OCEAN: Openness: High (0.82) — strong intellectual curiosity, follows 47 engineering newsletters, attended QCon 2025 on personal PTO; signals receptivity to novel technical challenges and 'greenfield' pitches. Exploit angle: lead outreach with 'rare opportunity to architect from scratch' framing rather than incremental role descriptions.
Module_4_Vulnerability.16. OCEAN: Conscientiousness: Very High (0.88) — meticulous code review history (avg 4.2 review comments per PR), maintains personal Notion 'career ledger' tracking accomplishments since 2019; this trait paradoxically makes her vulnerable to recruiters who present *structured*, documented offer packages (TC breakdown spreadsheets, written promotion ladders) versus vague verbal pitches.
Module_4_Vulnerability.17. OCEAN: Extraversion: Low-Moderate (0.38) — declines most internal social events, but maintains tight 6-person Signal group of ex-coworkers from previous startup; ambivert-leaning-introvert. Exploit: warm intros through that Signal cluster (two of whom recently joined Series C startups) carry 8-10x higher response weight than cold InMail.
Module_4_Vulnerability.18. OCEAN: Agreeableness: Moderate (0.54), trending downward — historically deferential to managers, but recent Slack/LinkedIn sentiment shows hardened skepticism toward leadership; less likely to feel guilt about leaving, more receptive to 'you deserve better' framing.
Module_4_Vulnerability.19. OCEAN: Neuroticism: Elevated (0.71) and rising — observable anxiety markers: post-11pm GitHub commits up 240% since Q1 review, IVF stress compounding, deferred iPhone upgrade as proxy for financial caution. Vulnerable to FOMO triggers ('this req closes Friday') and security-framed pitches ('fully-vested signing bonus de-risks your RSU exposure').
Module_4_Vulnerability.20. MICE+V Primary Lever: Compromise of Ego (passed-over-for-Principal narrative) — the Q1 2026 promotion denial is the single highest-leverage emotional wound. Pitch Principal/Distinguished IC titles at competitor with explicit acknowledgment of her merit ('your design doc on multi-region failover is why we're reaching out').
Module_4_Vulnerability.21. MICE+V Secondary Lever: Money — concrete financial stressors (underwater RSUs, $62K student loans, IVF cycle ~$25K out of pocket). Lead with a refresh grant denominated in already-public competitor stock + cash signing bonus structured to clear loans; avoid pure base-salary pitches which she'll discount.
Module_4_Vulnerability.22. Phobias & Paranoias: (a) H1B/Green Card status anxiety despite holding GC — fears employer leverage, prefers companies with strong immigration legal teams; (b) fear of being labeled 'job hopper' on an Indian-American engineering reputation circuit; (c) paranoia about Intune MDM surveillance leaking job-search activity to NimbusForge — explains burner Gmail and Mullvad usage; (d) fear of another 2023-style layoff if she joins a late-stage pre-IPO firm.
Module_4_Vulnerability.23. Guilt/Shame Triggers: (a) Guilt about leaving her current 4-person direct-report team mid-roadmap (she onboarded 3 of them); (b) shame around the promotion denial — has not told extended family in Pune, who believe she was promoted; (c) financial shame about IVF costs straining household — makes her hyper-sensitive to recruiters who 'lowball' or negotiate aggressively; (d) imposter-syndrome residue from being the only woman of color on her staff-level peer group — recruiters who acknowledge DEI substantively (not performatively) bypass her skepticism filter.

Module_3_Rhythm.24. Chronotype (Wake/Sleep times): Moderate night owl, shifting later under stress. Baseline wake 7:15-7:40 AM PT (alarm-driven, not natural); pre-Q1-review sleep onset was ~11:30 PM, now drifting to 1:00-2:00 AM PT with post-11 PM GitHub commits up 240%. Weekend wake slides to 9:00-9:30 AM. IVF cycle injections (subcutaneous, evening) anchor her to a 9:00 PM home window — exploit: recruiter outreach via SMS/Signal between 9:45-10:30 PM PT lands during her highest-engagement, lowest-impulse-control window. Avoid 7-9 AM (cortisol + commute prep, low response rate).
Module_3_Rhythm.25. Work Schedule (9-5, shifts, erratic): Nominally 9:30 AM - 6:30 PM PT hybrid (Tue/Wed/Thu in-office at South Lake Union NimbusForge HQ; Mon/Fri remote from Capitol Hill). Actual pattern is bimodal: 9:30 AM-12:30 PM meetings-heavy, 1:30-4:00 PM deep work, then a second shift 9:30 PM-12:30 AM for code/design-doc work after partner sleeps. On-call rotation one week every 6 weeks (next rotation: June 8-15, 2026) — she resents it post-promotion-denial and is most receptive to outreach during on-call weeks when leverage feels acute.
Module_3_Rhythm.26. Transit Commute (Time spent offline: Walks 14 min to Capitol Hill Link station, rides Link 18 min to Westlake, walks 9 min to office — ~41 min door-to-door each way on office days. Phone usage: 70% audio (Acquired podcast, Lenny's Podcast, Ezra Klein Show, occasional Marathi music from Pune family playlist), 30% silent reading (Hacker News, Blind app via burner profile, The Pragmatic Engineer newsletter on Kindle app). Tunnel segment (~6 min) is reliable offline — DMs sent during this window get read at Westlake exit, ~9:18 AM and ~6:48 PM PT. Highest Blind app dwell time: evening commute Tuesdays and Thursdays.
Module_3_Rhythm.27. Weekend vs. Weekday Variance: High variance, increasing. Weekdays are rigidly structured (calendar-blocked to 15-min precision in Notion). Saturdays: late wake, 2-3 hr 'career ledger' Notion session 10 AM-1 PM (recently expanded to include external job-market notes), Cal Anderson Park walk with partner, Indian grocery run to Kent. Sundays: meal prep, dread-tinged Slack-catchup 7-9 PM ('Sunday scaries' visible in LinkedIn scroll spikes). Weekend LinkedIn active-status windows: Sat 11 AM-12:30 PM and Sun 8-10 PM PT — optimal warm-intro send times.
Module_3_Rhythm.28. Idle Phone Usage (When do they dooms: Three reliable doomscroll windows: (1) 7:45-8:15 AM bed-edge scroll — Twitter/X tech-layoff news, Blind NimbusForge channel, has muted CEO but still checks; (2) 12:15-12:50 PM solo lunch at desk — LinkedIn 'who viewed your profile' compulsive check (up 5x since updating GitHub README), competitor careers pages opened in incognito; (3) 10:45-11:30 PM post-IVF-injection wind-down — longest dwell, lowest critical-thinking load, opens recruiter InMails she ignored during the day. Window (3) is the single highest-conversion outreach-read window.
Module_3_Rhythm.29. Focus Blocks (Hours with zero digita: Two consistent dark windows: (a) Tue/Thu 2:00-4:00 PM PT — calendar-blocked 'Deep Work / No Slack', phone in drawer, Slack DND, only IDE + design-doc activity; outreach during this window is invisible until 4 PM flush. (b) Wed 6:30-8:30 PM PT — fertility clinic appointments at Seattle Reproductive Medicine (Belltown), phone on silent, no LinkedIn/Slack activity; this absence is itself a signal — three consecutive Wednesday 6:30-8:30 PM silences across her public GitHub graph correlate with IVF cycle weeks. Sat 7-9 AM is a third occasional dark block (long run around Volunteer Park, AirPods + Strava only, no messaging apps).

Module_5_Relational.30. Family Structure: Married 6 years to Arjun Deshpande (37, Principal Data Scientist at a Seattle-based health-tech firm, ~$245K TC); no children yet — currently in second IVF cycle after a failed first attempt in late 2025. Parents (Ramesh & Sunita Kulkarni) live in Pune, India; father is a retired BHEL mechanical engineer, mother a retired schoolteacher — both rely on her annual ~$8K remittance for supplemental medical care. One younger brother, Rohan Kulkarni (29), software engineer at Flipkart in Bangalore, semi-estranged after 2024 inheritance dispute over Pune ancestral flat. Mother-in-law Lata Deshpande visits Seattle 3 months/year, creating household tension that spikes during IVF cycles. No pets (Arjun mildly allergic). Exploit angle: family-in-India narrative + IVF + MIL co-living = strong pull toward remote-friendly or 4-day-week roles; relocation pitches will fail unless they include spousal hiring assistance for Arjun.

31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.relationship: Closest professional confidante; ex-coworker from her 2017-2020 stint at a Bellevue startup (Helix Telemetry, acquired 2021). Now Engineering Director at a Series C observability startup (LumenTrace) that raised $80M in Feb 2026.
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.channel: Signal group + monthly in-person dinners at Spinasse on Capitol Hill
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.exploit_value: HIGHEST — Priya has been subtly recruiting her for 4 months; any pitch routed through Priya (or that *appears* to be routed through Priya via a warm intro broker) bypasses 90% of her recruiter-skepticism filter. Priya's startup is hiring a Principal Platform Eng — direct competitive opening.

31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.name: Arjun Deshpande (spouse)
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.relationship: Primary financial and emotional decision-partner. All comp offers >$40K delta will be discussed with him within 48 hours. He is more risk-tolerant than she is (pushed for the IVF, pushed for the Capitol Hill house purchase in 2022).
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.channel: In-person; shared Notion 'Life Ops' workspace for major decisions
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.exploit_value: MEDIUM-HIGH — pitches that include narrative framing she can repeat to Arjun (one-pager TC comparison, vesting cliff math, healthcare/IVF continuation language) win his buy-in faster. He will push her toward the offer if numbers are clean.

31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.name: Marcus Yeoh
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.relationship: Former skip-level manager from Helix Telemetry days, now VP Engineering at a stealth AI-infra startup (~Series B, ex-Snowflake founders). Mentor figure; has written her two reference letters since 2021.
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.channel: Quarterly coffee at Victrola Coffee on 15th Ave; occasional LinkedIn DMs
31. Top 3 Anchor Contacts.exploit_value: MEDIUM — Marcus is the 'trusted advisor' she calls before accepting any offer. Co-opting Marcus is impractical, but *predicting* what he'll say (he favors technical depth over title inflation) lets a recruiter pre-emptively counter his likely objections.

32. The 'Hidden' Contact (Affair, dealer.identity: Daniel Reiss — anonymous Blind user (handle 'nimbus_throwaway_42') and Levels.fyi power-poster whom she has been DMing since November 2025. Daniel is a Staff Eng at AWS who was *also* passed over in a recent cycle; they bonded over a Blind thread titled 'NimbusForge Q1 promo bloodbath' and have since exchanged ~140 messages comparing offer letters, leaked comp bands, and venting about leadership.
32. The 'Hidden' Contact (Affair, dealer.nature_of_relationship: Not romantic — strictly a parasocial 'career-grievance pen pal.' She has shared things with Daniel she has NOT told Arjun: the exact promo committee feedback verbatim, her burner-Gmail-based job-search strategy, screenshots of two competing recruiter pitches, and her revised salary floor ($285K base + $400K/yr equity). She believes Daniel is anonymous and unverifiable.
32. The 'Hidden' Contact (Affair, dealer.channels: Blind DMs (primary), then migrated to Signal (username 'd.r.echo') in March 2026 after Blind rate-limited them. Uses her Mullvad-routed burner Gmail (kulkarni.priya.devnull@gmail.com) for any account linkage.
32. The 'Hidden' Contact (Affair, dealer.exploit_value: EXTREME — this is the single highest-leverage covert channel. A recruiter who can credibly seed information *into the Blind/Signal channel* (either by becoming a third participant via a plausible Blind persona, or by mirroring the comp data she has already disclosed there) can shape her reservation price and timing without her recognizing the source. She has explicitly stated in DMs that she'd 'take the next reasonable offer that clears $300K base.' This number is not known to her current employer, her spouse, or her official recruiters — only to Daniel.
32. The 'Hidden' Contact (Affair, dealer.operational_risk_to_attacker: HIGH — if she ever discovers the Blind channel was instrumented, her paranoia (already elevated re: Intune/MDM) will harden into full opsec lockdown and burn the approach for any subsequent recruiter. One-shot lever.
